excluded.reason: Non-profit certification alliance with no equity structure. Not investable as a direct investment.
Acquired by Groupe ISAGRI on January 7, 2025. No longer an independent investable entity.

replacements.reason: Highest-ranked remaining company with medium/high Score Confidence. Seed-stage soil carbon sensor with commercial vineyard deployments.

selectionRule: Top 3 eligible deep-research candidates after investability review — not simply top 3 by score.
